notFoundBody: If you just placed this order, try refreshing the page. Otherwise, contact us via WhatsApp with your order number.
receivedNote: We've received your order. Our team will reach out via WhatsApp to confirm once your payment is received.
useAsReference: Use this number as your transfer reference.
expiredNote: This order may have been cancelled. Please contact us for more information.
willContactTitle: Our team will reach out to you
willContactBody: Once we receive your payment, the TokoHPL team will contact you via WhatsApp at {phone} within 24 business hours to confirm your order and shipping details.
step1: Transfer {amount} to the BCA account above
step2: Enter your order number as the transfer reference: {id}
step3: Send payment confirmation via WhatsApp using the button below
whatsappAutoNote: The button above will open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message.
